organization.name: The Pigsty
organization.description: The Pigsty helps pig farmers manage health, breeding, feed, and profitability records in one place.

softwareApplication.name: The Pigsty

offers.description: Free plan available for smallholder pig farms.

softwareApplication.description: Pig farm management software for smallholders. Track health, breeding, feed, inventory, and farm performance.

mainEntity.name: Can I use The Pigsty for a small family farm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Pigsty is designed for smallholder and family pig farms, with a simple workflow that works from your first pig onward.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a credit card to start?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. You can start on the free tier without a credit card and upgrade later when your farm needs more capacity.

mainEntity.name: Can my team and I use the same records?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Team workflows let farm owners and workers use the same records, reducing errors and duplicated work.
